title: rubus strigosus var. tonsus
intro: Rubus strigosus var. tonsus, also known as the dwarf red raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant that is characterized by its compact growth habit and smaller fruit. The medicinal properties of Rubus strigosus var. tonsus include its high content of anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus strigosus var. tonsus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to have anti-cancer properties. Rubus strigosus var. tonsus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
